TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Juan_Orlando_Hernández, title = Juan_Orlando_Hernández, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Juan_Orlando_Hernández} }

S.FORM: thumb|labah Honduras Juan Orlando Hernández ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 10, Juan Orlando Hernández, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1968) mrhuw Honduras ta' misuw hya' ga Juan Orlando Hernández, aring ryax tay 27 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

thumb|labah Honduras Juan Orlando Hernández ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 10, Juan Orlando Hernández, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1968) mrhuw Honduras ta' misuw hya' ga Juan Orlando Hernández, aring ryax tay 27 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: tħumβ|laβaħ ħon*uras~ɕ *uan orlan*o ħern*n*ez rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *uan orlan*o ħern*n*ez, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ħon*uras~ɕ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *uan orlan*o ħern*n*ez, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
